messages.content:
I provide outstanding customer guidance and product arrangement. During this time, I have consistently
demonstrated an unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional service and top-notch products to
customers, as evidenced by my 100% satisfaction ratings on customer surveys. My ability to stay organized
and manage multiple tasks simultaneously has enabled me to efficiently manage inventory levels and
maintain a high level of accuracy in the product arrangement process. WRITE THIS IDEA BY IDEA

I excel in delivering exceptional customer guidance and organizing products effectively. My dedication to providing superior service is reflected in my perfect satisfaction ratings from customer surveys. My organizational skills and ability to multitask have been crucial in maintaining accurate inventory and ensuring products are arranged correctly.
NO EVERY IDEAY IN EACH LINE

- I excel in delivering exceptional customer guidance.
- I am skilled at effective product arrangement.
- My dedication to superior service is reflected in 100% satisfaction ratings on customer surveys.
- My organizational skills enable efficient inventory management.
- I am capable of multitasking, ensuring high accuracy in product arrangement.

this also I have extensive experience in this field, having worked as a vegetable picker in a city of Agadir
which known in agriculture field. I pick tomato, chillies and many other kind of vegetables. I was also
working in packing these products in crates and putting them in trucks and various other means of
transportation in order to export them to various Moroccan cities and even export them abroad.

- I have extensive experience in the agricultural field.
- My work experience includes being a vegetable picker in Agadir, a city known for agriculture.
- I have picked various types of vegetables, including tomatoes and chillies.
- I have experience in packing these agricultural products into crates.
- I was involved in loading packed crates onto trucks and other transportation modes.
- My work contributed to exporting these products to different Moroccan cities and abroad.
REWRITE IT IN A GOOD WAY

- I possess significant experience in the agricultural sector, specifically as a vegetable picker in Agadir, a city renowned for its agricultural prowess.
- My expertise spans the picking of a diverse range of vegetables, such as tomatoes and chillies, among others.
- In addition to harvesting, my responsibilities extended to carefully packing these products into crates.
- I played a crucial role in the logistics of loading these crates onto trucks and other means of transport.
- My efforts were instrumental in facilitating the distribution of these products, not only within various Moroccan cities but also to international markets.

THIS ALSO Baccalaureate +1: After obtaining the baccalaureate, I went on to complete postgraduate studies, so I
enrolled in the University of Sultan Moulay Slimane, which is located in Beni Mellal, in the Department of
English Studies. Two years later, I obtained the baccalaureate +1.

- Upon achieving my baccalaureate, I pursued further education by enrolling in postgraduate studies.
- I attended the University of Sultan Moulay Slimane, situated in Beni Mellal.
- My focus was in the Department of English Studies.
- Two years into my postgraduate journey, I successfully achieved a baccalaureate +1.
TOO SHORT PLEASE

Following the completion of my baccalaureate, I embarked on a journey to deepen my academic knowledge and skills, choosing to continue my education through postgraduate studies. To this end, I enrolled at the prestigious University of Sultan Moulay Slimane, which is nestled in the scenic city of Beni Mellal, known for its vibrant academic community. My academic pursuits led me to the Department of English Studies, a field that I am deeply passionate about and eager to explore further. Over the course of two years, I dedicated myself to rigorous study and intellectual growth within this discipline. This commitment to my educational development culminated in the attainment of a significant academic milestone: the completion of my studies and the earning of a baccalaureate +1, marking a proud achievement in my academic journey.
DO IT IDEA BY IDEA INEACH LINE

- I completed my baccalaureate and decided to pursue further education.
- I chose to continue with postgraduate studies to expand my knowledge and skills.
- I enrolled at the University of Sultan Moulay Slimane, located in the vibrant city of Beni Mellal.
- My academic focus was in the Department of English Studies, reflecting my passion for the field.
- After two years of dedicated study and engagement in my chosen discipline,
- I successfully achieved a baccalaureate +1, marking a significant milestone in my educational journey.
MAKE IT SHORT

- Completed my baccalaureate and pursued postgraduate studies.
- Enrolled at the University of Sultan Moulay Slimane in Beni Mellal.
- Focused on English Studies.
- After two years, achieved a baccalaureate +1.
THIS ALSO

- After my baccalaureate, I advanced to postgraduate studies.
- Studied at Sultan Moulay Slimane University, in Beni Mellal.
- Specialized in English Studies.
- Earned a baccalaureate +1 in two years.

Baccalaureate: I entered Al-Massira High School in 2016, and in the 2018-2019
school season, I successfully passed the baccalaureate exam in Literature and
Humanities.
THIS ALSO

- Started at Al-Massira High School in 2016.
- By the 2018-2019 academic year, passed the baccalaureate.
- Specialized in Literature and Humanities.
also but worker in salon de beauty
- Worked in a beauty salon.
workerd in reception in salon de beauty
- Served as a receptionist in a beauty salon.
make it long

I embarked on an enriching tenure in the beauty industry by undertaking a role at the front desk of a well-regarded beauty salon. My responsibilities were multifaceted, primarily revolving around welcoming clients, managing appointments, and ensuring a smooth operational flow within the establishment. This position not only honed my customer service skills but also provided me with invaluable experience in managing salon schedules, coordinating between clients and service providers, and maintaining a warm and inviting atmosphere for everyone who walked through the door.
but every idea in each line

- I took on a rewarding role as the receptionist at a prestigious beauty salon.
- My duties included greeting clients warmly, setting a positive first impression for the salon.
- I was responsible for efficiently managing appointment schedules to ensure smooth salon operations.
- This role significantly enhanced my skills in customer service, learning to meet a variety of client needs.
- I also coordinated communication between clients and service providers, streamlining service delivery.
- My experience contributed to maintaining a welcoming and professional environment within the salon.
in french please*

- J'ai assumé un rôle gratifiant en tant que réceptionniste dans un salon de beauté prestigieux.
- Mes tâches incluaient l'accueil chaleureux des clients, créant ainsi une première impression positive pour le salon.
- J'étais chargé de gérer efficacement les plannings de rendez-vous pour assurer le bon déroulement des opérations du salon.
- Ce rôle a considérablement amélioré mes compétences en service client, apprenant à répondre à une variété de besoins des clients.
- J'ai également coordonné la communication entre les clients et les prestataires de services, rationalisant ainsi la prestation de services.
- Mon expérience a contribué à maintenir un environnement accueillant et professionnel au sein du salon.
duties of pressing worker

A pressing worker in a laundry or dry cleaning service has several key responsibilities to ensure garments are cleaned, pressed, and returned to customers in impeccable condition. Here are some of their primary duties:

1. **Inspecting Garments:** Checking each item for stains, damages, or special requirements before the cleaning process begins.
   
2. **Sorting Garments:** Organizing clothes based on color, fabric type, and cleaning technique required, ensuring that items are processed correctly and efficiently.

3. **Operating Machinery:** Using various machines such as washers, dryers, and presses. This includes setting the correct temperatures and cleaning cycles for different types of fabrics.

4. **Stain Removal:** Applying pre-treatment and stain removers to areas needing special attention, using knowledge of chemicals and fabric care to avoid damage.

5. **Pressing and Finishing:** Ironing or steaming garments to remove wrinkles and restore their original shape. This may involve using hand irons, pressing machines, or steamers, depending on the garment and the desired finish.

6. **Quality Control:** Inspecting each garment after cleaning and pressing to ensure it meets the establishment’s standards of cleanliness and presentation. Any items not up to standard may need to be re-cleaned or pressed.

7. **Packing and Presenting:** Folding, hanging, and packaging clothes in a manner that maintains their cleanliness and appearance for return to the customer. This may include wrapping items in plastic or placing them in garment bags.

8. **Customer Service:** Interacting with customers upon drop-off and pick-up, which includes recording orders, tagging garments, explaining services, and handling transactions.

9. **Maintenance:** Performing basic maintenance and cleaning of machines and work areas to ensure a safe and efficient working environment.

10. **Inventory Management:** Keeping track of cleaning supplies and materials, ordering new stock as necessary, and managing garment inventory to ensure items are not lost or misplaced.

Each of these responsibilities is crucial for providing high-quality garment care and maintaining customer satisfaction in a pressing and cleaning service.
make it too short and write idea in each line like above

1. Inspect garments for stains or damages.
2. Sort clothes by color, fabric, and cleaning needs.
3. Operate washing, drying, and pressing machines.
4. Apply stain removers and pre-treatments.
5. Press and steam garments to remove wrinkles.
6. Perform quality checks to ensure standards are met.
7. Fold, hang, and package clothes for customer return.
8. Provide customer service at drop-off and pick-up.
9. Maintain and clean machines and work areas.
10. Manage supplies inventory and track garments.
in french please

1. Inspecter les vêtements pour détecter les taches ou dommages.
2. Trier les vêtements par couleur, tissu et besoins de nettoyage.
3. Utiliser les machines à laver, sèche-linge et presses.
4. Appliquer des détachants et traitements préalables.
5. Repasser et passer les vêtements à la vapeur pour enlever les plis.
6. Effectuer des contrôles de qualité pour garantir les normes.
7. Plier, suspendre et emballer les vêtements pour les clients.
8. Offrir le service client à la réception et lors de la collecte.
9. Entretenir et nettoyer les machines et les zones de travail.
10. Gérer l'inventaire des fournitures et le suivi des vêtements.
